Here is a comprehensive overview of the **YC W25 (Winter 2025) Batch** with a focus on **B2B AI startups**, based on the latest available information:

---

## 🚀 YC W25 (Winter 2025) — B2B AI Startups Overview

### 📅 Batch Overview
Y Combinator held its Winter 2025 Demo Day on **March 12, 2025**, showcasing its latest batch of **160 startups**. Almost all projects in W25 are AI-related — that's over 160 companies! According to analysts, if Winter 2025 was the rise of the AI agent, Summer 2025 was the entrenchment of AI agents across verticals.

---

### 🔑 Key Trends in YC W25
- A surprising number of startups were creating tools to **enhance other companies' AI agents** — rather than building their own AI agents, these startups are building **support tools**.
- Institutional projects and traditional industries are a growing focus. Several AI startups in YC W25 target governments and classic industries like **agriculture and real estate**.
- The 2025 YC cohorts feature four batches — Winter (W25), Spring (X25), Summer (S25), and Fall (F25) — with a strong emphasis on **AI-driven solutions** across industries like healthcare, sales, finance, and developer tools.

---

### 🏢 Notable B2B AI Startups from YC W25

Here are some of the highlighted B2B-focused AI companies from the W25 batch:

#### 🤖 AI Agent Infrastructure & Tooling
| Company | What They Do |
|---|---|
| **Abundant** | Took the concept of teleoperation (used by Waymo) and built a platform applying it to all AI agents. Its API catches when an AI agent fails and allows human operators to step in and take over. |
| **Browser Use** | An open-source tool for web-browsing AI agents that went viral after Chinese AI agent Manus used it. As web-browsing AI agents like OpenAI's Operator take off, Browser Use offers a compelling open-source tool that enables them. |
| **Agentin AI** | Agents that move data and take actions across enterprise systems. |
| **ZeroEntropy** | An adaptive AI retrieval engine that personalizes search results for AI agents. |
| **Asteroid** | Builds and hosts browser AI agents for complex tasks in regulated industries. |

#### 📊 Finance, Accounting & Legal
| Company | What They Do |
|---|---|
| **Tally** | AI agents that automate accounting, tax, and audit. |
| **Bluebook** | AI accounting agents to help firms serve more clients. |
| **Caseflood** | Replaces law firm admin with AI agents. |

#### 📞 Customer Service & Contact Centers
| Company | What They Do |
|---|---|
| **Voice AI startup** | Powers voice AI agents that automate complex, high-volume contact center operations, automating up to 70% of customer support calls while maintaining a 90% customer satisfaction rate. |
| **Calltree AI** | Analyzes call center workflows to cut costs. |
| **careCycle** | AI voice teams for Medicare and ACA distributors. |

#### 🏥 Healthcare & Vertical-Specific AI
| Company | What They Do |
|---|---|
| **Clinical Trial Matching** | Helps doctor's offices generate revenue by using AI to match patients with clinical trials, automating patient prescreening and unlocking new revenue streams from Big Pharma. |
| **Toothy AI** | Automates back-office operations for dental clinics. |

#### 🏭 Operations & Enterprise Automation
| Company | What They Do |
|---|---|
| **Optifye** | Building software to manage factory workers. |
| **NextByte** | Helps companies find the best "vibe coders" through an AI model that powers interview questions testing coders' skills at leveraging AI. |
| **Sift** | An AI-powered fraud decisioning company that helps digital businesses optimize risk-reward decisions. |

#### 📈 Customer Insights
| Company | What They Do |
|---|---|
| **Customer Insights Platform** | Transforms Slack, emails, WhatsApp, and call transcripts into actionable insights — helping founders stay connected, spot trends, and drive impact. |

---

### 📌 Where to Find the Full List
For the **complete and official list** of all YC W25 companies, you can visit:
- 🔗 **Official YC Directory**: [ycombinator.com/companies?batch=Winter+2025](https://www.ycombinator.com/companies?batch=Winter+2025)
- 🔗 **Extruct AI W25 Interactive Table**: [extruct.ai/ycombinator-companies/w25](https://www.extruct.ai/ycombinator-companies/w25/)

> 💡 **Tip**: The compiled lists from third-party sources may not be exhaustive. For complete and updated information, refer to the official YC directory.
